instruction: Create a comprehensive 36-month financial forecast for Sovereign-Node-Watch as a CSV file. Requirements: Include columns for Month (1-36), New Customers, Total Customers, Churned Customers, MRR (Monthly Recurring Revenue in EUR), ARR (Annualized), ARPU (Average Revenue Per User), CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost), LTV (Lifetime Value), Gross Margin %, Operating Expenses, Net Revenue, Cumulative Revenue, Cumulative Costs, Break-even indicator (Y/N). Use these assumptions: Starting: 0 customers, Month 1 launch. Growth: 15 new customers/month initially, growing 8% month-over-month. Churn: 5% monthly. ARPU: €25/month (blended across tiers). CAC: €45 per customer. Gross Margin: 85%. Monthly OpEx: €8,000 (infrastructure + support). Show break-even point clearly. The CSV should be professionally formatted and ready for investor review. Save as shared/results/DATA_ROOM/05_FINANCIAL_FORECAST.csv
